completedWork: Relay Switching Circuit Simulation - NEW: Interactive electromagnetic relay switching simulation with contact bounce and flyback protection analysis. Features: Coil voltage control (5-24V DC), contact type selection (SPDT, DPDT, NO/NC), contact bounce simulation with adjustable bounce duration (1-20ms), inductive kickback visualization with/without flyback diode, real-time switching animation, contact rating (current: 1-30A, voltage: 30-250V), load control demonstration, coil resistance (50-2000Ω), load resistance (10-1000Ω). Real-time calculations: Coil current (I = V/R), coil power (P = V²/R), load current (when relay energized), load power, contact stress percentage (% of rated capacity), kickback voltage (V = L × di/dt), protection status with/without flyback diode. Visual feedback: Interactive SVG circuit diagram with animated current flow, magnetic field visualization when energized, contact arm animation, current flow indicators with pulse effects, contact stress level status (NORMAL/MODERATE/HIGH STRESS/OVERLOADED), kickback danger indicator (SAFE/WARNING/DANGEROUS). Quick presets: Automotive Relay (12V, 30A), Industrial Relay (24V, 10A), Signal Relay (5V, 1A), Power Relay (24V, 20A). Educational content: Relay working principles, contact bounce explanation (causes, duration, effects), inductive kickback theory, flyback diode protection, common applications (automotive, industrial, home automation, telecom), key formulas, practical design considerations.

RMS Voltage Calculator - NEW: Calculate RMS, Average, and Peak-to-Peak values for different AC waveforms. Features: 6 waveform types (Sine, Square, Triangle, Sawtooth, Half-Wave Rectified, Full-Wave Rectified), peak voltage input (0.1-500V), real-time calculations with multiple unit display (µV, mV, V, kV). Real-time calculations: RMS voltage (waveform-specific formulas: Vp/√2 for sine, Vp for square, Vp/√3 for triangle/sawtooth, Vp/2 for half-wave), average rectified voltage (2Vp/π for sine, Vp/2 for triangle, Vp/π for half-wave), peak-to-peak voltage (2Vp for most waveforms), crest factor (Vpeak/VRMS), form factor (VRMS/Vaverage). Visual feedback: Interactive waveform SVG visualization showing shape, amplitude, positive/negative peaks, animated waveform rendering, color-coded peak indicators (+Vp, -Vp, 0V). Waveform comparison table showing all waveforms with their RMS, average, crest factor, and form factor at current peak voltage. Quick presets: 120V AC US Mains (170V peak), 230V AC EU Mains (325V peak), Digital Logic 5V Square, Audio Signal 1V Sine. Educational content: RMS voltage definition and significance, why RMS matters (power calculations, mains voltage, meter readings, component ratings), waveform characteristics for each type, crest factor importance (peakiness, power supply design, true-RMS measurements), form factor significance (waveform shape, transformer design), practical applications (power distribution, audio equipment, multimeters, power supplies), key formulas summary.
latestCommit: feat: add Relay Switching Circuit simulation and RMS Voltage calculator
buildStatus: Complete - Two new features created: Relay Switching Circuit simulation (electromagnetic relay with contact bounce analysis, inductive kickback visualization, flyback diode protection, and comprehensive relay theory) and RMS Voltage Calculator (6 waveform types with RMS/average/peak calculations, waveform comparison table, and detailed AC voltage theory). Both features include interactive SVG diagrams, real-time computations, visual feedback, and educational content. Files created at pages/simulations/relay-switching-circuit.vue and pages/calculators/rms-voltage-calculator.vue.
